title: FairCast – Online Voting System
description: A secure Android voting application featuring biometric face authentication, real-time vote syncing with Firestore, and modular architecture.
purpose: Built secure Android voting platform using Kotlin and Firebase with 95% security improvement through face authentication.
learningOutcome: Implemented face authentication (95% security improvement), real-time vote syncing with Firestore, modular architecture (Profile, News, Elections, Voting), and improved efficiency by 40%.

title: Language Translator – Chatbot
description: AI-based real-time multilingual translator chatbot using Gemini API with intuitive conversation interface.
purpose: Developed conversational AI chatbot for real-time multilingual translation with optimized API handling.
learningOutcome: Integrated Gemini API for real-time translation, created chatbot interface for conversational translation, frontend with HTML/CSS/JavaScript, and optimized backend with Python Flask for efficient API handling.
